prompt: Create a realistic, appetizing food photograph of Japanese omurice served on a large pale gray ceramic plate. The main subject is a glossy golden omelet draped over reddish ketchup fried rice, with the rice visibly peeking out along the bottom edge. On top of the omelet, draw a cute anime-style girl face using red ketchup lines: bobbed hair framing the face, short bangs, two large eyes, a small smiling mouth, and simple cheek/jaw lines, as if it is omurice art of a cute anime girl. Place a side salad on the right side of the plate with exactly 3 visible components: leafy green lettuce, dark red/purple leaves, and 1 cherry tomato, plus a light creamy dressing drizzle. Set the plate on a warm wooden café table near a softly lit window. Include exactly 2 background glass items: 1 small glass vase with tiny white flowers on the left and 1 clear water glass on the right, both softly blurred. Use natural morning sunlight, shallow depth of field, warm cozy tones, high-detail food texture, realistic reflections on the omelet, and a horizontal 16:9 composition. No text, no watermark, no hands, no utensils.
